sourceLabel: IASLC 9th edition lung cancer TNM stage groups

tCategories.label: T1b
tCategories.descriptor: Tumor greater than 1 cm and 2 cm or smaller

tCategories.label: T1c
tCategories.descriptor: Tumor greater than 2 cm and 3 cm or smaller

tCategories.label: T2a
tCategories.descriptor: Tumor greater than 3 cm and 4 cm or smaller, or a qualifying T2 feature

tCategories.label: T2b
tCategories.descriptor: Tumor greater than 4 cm and 5 cm or smaller

tCategories.label: T3
tCategories.descriptor: Tumor greater than 5 cm and 7 cm or smaller, selected local invasion, or same-lobe separate nodules

tCategories.label: T4
tCategories.descriptor: Tumor greater than 7 cm, major invasion, or separate nodule in a different ipsilateral lobe

nCategories.label: N1
nCategories.descriptor: Ipsilateral peribronchial, hilar, or intrapulmonary nodes

nCategories.label: N2a
nCategories.descriptor: Single ipsilateral mediastinal or subcarinal station

nCategories.label: N2b
nCategories.descriptor: Multiple ipsilateral mediastinal or subcarinal stations

nCategories.label: N3
nCategories.descriptor: Contralateral mediastinal or hilar, or scalene/supraclavicular nodes

mCategories.label: M1a
mCategories.descriptor: Pleural/pericardial nodules or malignant effusion, or contralateral lung nodule

mCategories.label: M1b
mCategories.descriptor: Single extrathoracic metastasis in one organ system

mCategories.label: M1c1
mCategories.descriptor: Multiple extrathoracic metastases in one organ system

mCategories.label: M1c2
mCategories.descriptor: Multiple extrathoracic metastases in multiple organ systems

rows.descriptor: greater than 1 cm and 2 cm or smaller
greater than 2 cm and 3 cm or smaller
greater than 4 cm and 5 cm or smaller
T3 size, invasion, or same-lobe nodule
T4 size, invasion, or different ipsilateral lobe nodule
